const_add.termination: constant_folding when both args are literals

const_mul.termination: constant_folding when both args are literals

type_family_define.signature: (name: String, params: String, result: String) -> Unit

type_family_apply.effect: applies registered type family; requires prior definition

termination_reasons.structural: type family application over known family
termination_reasons.unbounded_recursion: argument contains free variable or unknown call
